name: synthetic_trajectory_dataset_v1
description: Toy ego-trajectory prediction dataset for week-1 E2E planning practice.

history.meaning: Past ego positions in ego-centric frame, meters. Last history point is near [0, 0].

future.meaning: Future ego positions in same ego-centric frame, meters.

files.train/metadata.csv: sample_id, split, traj_type, label, generation parameters
files.test/metadata.csv: sample_id, split, traj_type, label, generation parameters
